Data Collection Coordinator

Job Description


As a Data Collection Coordinator, you will be at the heart of a dynamic sales support team, ensuring campaigns run seamlessly. By collecting data for performance proof and detailed recaps, you’ll streamline processes, save time for sales teams, and boost renewals and revenue—all while driving success across diverse markets and products.


Job Overview


Employment Type: Full-Time
Shift: Night Shift (Shifting)
Work Setup: Temporary WFH, Makati City
Perks: Day 1 HMO, Above-market salary, Global exposure


A Symphony of Opportunities Awaits


Day 1 HMO coverage with free dependent
Competitive Salary Package
Temporary WFH arrangement
Prime office location in Makati (Easy access to MRT stations, restaurants, and banks)
Unlimited upskilling through Emapta Academy courses (Want to know more? Visit https://bit.ly/EmaptaTrainingCalendar)
Free 24/7 access to our office gyms (Ortigas and Makati) with a free physical fitness trainer!
Exclusive Emapta Lifestyle perks (hotel and restaurant discounts, and more!)
Unlimited opportunities for employee referral incentives across the organization
Standard government and Emapta benefits
Total of 20 annual leaves to be used on your own discretion (including 5 credits convertible to cash)
Fun engagement activities for employees
Mentorship and exposure to global leaders and teams
Career growth opportunities
Diverse and supportive work environment


The Fine Print of Excellence


Possess a proactive and independent work ethic.
Demonstrate familiarity with Wrike and Veritone (preferred).
Exhibit strong written and verbal communication skills.
Proficiency in Salesforce is a plus (preferred).
Showcase exceptional organizational and prioritization abilities in a fast-paced environment.
Maintain positive energy and resilience under pressure.
Display flexibility, creativity, and openness to new ideas.
Possess outstanding interpersonal skills with the ability to collaborate effectively.
Previous experience or understanding of media sales is beneficial.


Your Script for Impact


Collaborate with sales support professionals to provide proof-of-performance materials for national and local campaigns.
Ensure advertising campaign success by maintaining accurate and up-to-date pre and post logs.
Gather and edit airchecks of live campaign creative, ensuring the accuracy of copy.
Capture and organize screenshots of live campaign materials.

Digital Client Success Manager
Job Description


As a Digital Client Success Manager, you will be at the heart of driving impactful digital campaigns. Manage high-profile national media campaigns, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and ensure seamless campaign delivery from start to finish.


Job Overiew


Employment Type: Full-time
Shift: Shifting
Work Setup: Temporary WFH (Makati City)
Perks: Day 1 HMO, Above-market salary, Global exposure


A Playlist of Career Benefits


Day 1 HMO coverage with free dependent
Competitive Salary Package
Temporary WFH arrangement
Prime office location in Makati (Easy access to MRT stations, restaurants, and banks)
Unlimited upskilling through Emapta Academy courses (Want to know more? Visit https://bit.ly/EmaptaTrainingCalendar)
Free 24/7 access to our office gyms (Ortigas and Makati) with a free physical fitness trainer!
Exclusive Emapta Lifestyle perks (hotel and restaurant discounts, and more!)
Unlimited opportunities for employee referral incentives across the organization
Standard government and Emapta benefits
Total of 20 annual leaves to be used on your own discretion (including 5 credits convertible to cash)
Fun engagement activities for employees
Mentorship and exposure to global leaders and teams
Career growth opportunities
Diverse and supportive work environment


The Frequency of Excellence


2–3 years of digital media experience in a similar role.
Previous experience in programmatic ad operations is a plus.
Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel.
Strong communication skills with a focus on clarity and impact.
Expertise in analyzing and reporting digital media campaign results.
Proven ability to manage projects from inception to completion.
Excellent organizational skills with the ability to prioritize and manage time effectively.
High attention to detail and adherence to high work standards.
Exceptional problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
Capability to handle high volumes of work in a fast-paced environment while maintaining composure.
Outstanding interpersonal skills with an emphasis on collaboration and partnership with sales teams to deliver exceptional client service.


Fine-Tuning Success Every Day


Oversee the post-sale execution of national digital media campaigns, focusing on direct campaigns under $75,000 and programmatic guaranteed deals.
Collaborate with internal departments to ensure programs are booked and executed in alignment with operational and sales goals.
Manage client communications during the setup, launch, flight, and recap phases of both direct and programmatic campaigns across multiple DSPs (e.g., DV360, TTD).
Schedule and lead internal and external calls as needed, ensuring production timelines and deliverables are communicated effectively to exceed client expectations.
Partner with Sales, agencies, third-party measurement vendors, and AdOps teams to troubleshoot campaigns and resolve issues promptly.
Coordinate with pod operations to address creative and tracking challenges.
Maintain and optimize client campaigns to improve performance against predetermined benchmarks on an ongoing basis.
Ensure full delivery of dollars booked across all digital, social, and podcast deliverables.
Collaborate with the billing and finance teams monthly to reconcile billing accurately and on time.
Deliver comprehensive post-campaign wrap-ups, including final reports and one-sheet recaps with insights and learnings.

Research on market trends, competitors, and audience preferences to support team initiatives;
Gather and organize marketing and sales data for reporting purposes, ensuring information is accurate and accessible;
Organize and maintain digital files, documents, and records;
Explore and implement emerging technologies, including AI tools, to optimize workflows.


Customer Service
Resolve customer requests via email and social media promptly and accurately, using Zendesk System, and Google/Meta services;
Assist with various administrative tasks, including Group Sales, working with affiliates, and completing projects across the organization.


You’ll thrive in this role if you are:
Creative and Tech-Savvy: Have interest or experience in design and video editing, with knowledge of tools like Canva, CRM platforms, and Google Services, and are interested in emerging tools and AI.
Detail-oriented: Excel in quality control and maintaining consistency across deliverables.
Customer Support Guru: Have experience in customer support or a similar role.
Action-Oriented: Have a strong ability to prioritize and juggle multiple priorities, proven at getting things done in a fast-paced dynamic & growing environment.
Communication champion: You can clearly explain complex information in written and verbal form to people who aren't experts.
Remote ready: You thrive in a remote environment and enjoy the flexibility and independence it offers.


Additional Information:
We are looking to hire someone willing to work 40 hours per week and is open to work evenings (US morning time).
It is a fully remote contract position, with Independent Contractors responsible for their taxes and benefits. 
Each applicant is required to complete a paid Trial Period before transitioning to this role.

Day 1 HMO coverage with free dependent
